title: Live Updates: Tehran, Beirut and Tel Aviv Are Targeted in Attacks and Counterattacks
summary_full: The Israeli military said it was striking Iran’s capital while pounding Hezbollah targets in Lebanon, as fighting there intensified. Iran said it was targeting Tel Aviv, the country’s state news agency reported.
